general.commands.profile.param.user: User whose profile you want to view (optional)
general.errors.menu_wrong_user: You cannot interact with this menu.
general.welcome.dm_forbidden_fallback: {owner_mention}, I cannot send you a DM, so I am writing here!
general.welcome.header:
Welcome to Anti Raid Bot!
Dear {owner_mention}, thank you for adding **Anti Raid Bot** to your server **{guild_name}**!
general.welcome.features:
**What I can do**
**Role protection**: Block unwanted roles with `/role_blacklist`.
**Server control**: Enable server freeze with `/freeze_mode` (premium).
**Anti-raid**: Automatically remove roles when limits are exceeded.
**Trusted users**: Configure the list with `/trusted`.
**`/aban` command**: Manual security system.
general.welcome.get_started:
**How to start**
1. **Enable protection**: `/raid on`
2. **Configure settings**: `/limits`
3. **Add roles to the blacklist**: `/role_blacklist`
4. **Check status**: `/status`
5. **Manage trusted users**: `/trusted`
general.welcome.premium:
**Premium features**
Server freeze (`/freeze_mode`)
Custom bot avatar and banner (`/custom`)
Up to 10 roles in lists instead of 5
[Get premium](https://antiraidbot.ru/premium/)
general.leave.header:
AntiRaidBot removed!
Hello, {owner_mention}.

Your server is no longer protected by AntiRaidBot.
general.leave.support:
**Support server**
If you removed the bot by mistake or ran into a problem, please tell us on the support server!
[Join support](https://discord.gg/t6d8u8JBuy)
general.leave.info:
**Additional information**
We are constantly improving protection.
Premium expands limits.
Thank you for using our bot!
general.invite.header:
Add AntiRaidBot
AntiRaidBot helps your server survive raids, dangerous roles, and suspicious actions without manual panic.
general.invite.features:
**Core features**
**Anti-raid protection:** limits for role, channel, webhook creation and other dangerous actions.
**Automatic punishments:** the bot can remove roles, kick offenders, and stop threats.
**Role blacklists:** block unwanted roles and control their assignment.
**Trusted users:** flexible management of people you trust.
**Server freeze:** a fast lockdown mode for critical actions during an attack.
general.invite.why:
**Why add it**
Already works on **{total_servers}** servers.
Helps protect **{total_users}** users.
Configured through clear slash commands and interactive menus.
general.invite.more:
**More about AntiRaidBot**
See features, premium functions, and project details on the website: [antiraidbot.ru](https://antiraidbot.ru/)
To start protection, press **Add bot** below.
general.help.wrong_user_desc: You cannot interact with this menu. It was opened by another user.
general.help.header:
Anti Raid Bot | Help
Interactive command and feature guide for **{guild_name}**.
general.help.home_intro:
Hi, **{user_name}**!

I am **Anti Raid Bot**, built to protect your server from raids, malicious bots, and crashers.

**With me you can:**
Block unwanted role and channel actions
Freeze the server during attacks
Configure flexible security limits
Manage global bans (GBan)
general.help.tip:
**Tip of the day**
Start by configuring protection with `/settings`; most modules can be enabled in a few clicks!
general.help.resources:
**Useful resources**
**Premium status:** {premium_status}

- [Official website](https://antiraidbot.ru/)
- [Feature documentation](https://antiraidbot.ru/docs/)
- [Telegram channel](https://t.me/antiraiddiscord)
- [Discord support server](https://discord.com/invite/t6d8u8JBuy)
- [Get Premium](https://antiraidbot.ru/premium/)
general.help.basic:
Basic commands
Reference for everyday bot commands:

**Information:**
- `/help` - Open this interactive help guide.
- `/ping` - Check network latency, uptime, and resource usage.
- `/invite` - Get an invite to add the bot to another server.
- `/profile` - View a profile card with achievement badges.

**Utilities:**
- `/amnesty` - Instantly unban all banned members.
- `/permcopy` - Copy permissions from one channel to another.
- `/role_clear` - Instantly remove a role from all server members.
- `/creact` - Configure automatic message deletion by emoji reaction.
- `/creact_menu` - Control panel for reaction-delete roles.
- `/language` - Change bot language on the server.
general.help.protection:
Settings and protection
Tools for configuring protection modules against spammers, bots, and crashers:

**Anti-raid settings:**
- `/limits` - Configure daily moderator action limits.
- `/settings` - Main panel for all anti-raid modules.
- `/status` - Check current limits and security status.
- `/raid` - Emergency enable or disable raid protection.

**Whitelists and moderation:**
- `/role_blacklist` - Manage the blacklist of forbidden roles.
- `/trusted` - Configure trusted users who bypass daily limits.
- `/bot_verify` - Manage automatic verification for new bots.
- `/aban` - Emergency restrict offender permissions on the server.
- `/aban_menu` - Configure roles with access to `/aban`.
- `/antiremove_role` - Protect selected members from role edits.
general.help.global:
Global commands
Commands for the unified global security system:

**Global bans (GBan):**
- `/gsync` - Link this server to the global ban network.
- `/gban` - Ban an offender across all servers in the global network.
- `/gunban` - Globally unban a user across the network.
- `/gban_menu` - Configure roles with access to global bans.

**Sync:**
- `/grole_copy` - Sync role creation across all linked servers.
general.help.premium:
Premium features
Exclusive functionality for servers with an active Premium subscription:

**Server lockdown:**
- `/freeze_mode` - Full server freeze. Blocks channel and role changes and new bot additions by other users.

**Custom bot profile:**
- `/custom` - Set a separate AntiRaidBot avatar and banner only for your server.

**Doubled list limits:**
- Add up to **10 roles** instead of 5 in `/role_blacklist`, `/aban_menu`, `/gban_menu`, and `/creact_menu`.

**Visual status:**
- Get the badge next to your name in `/profile`.
general.help.badges:
Badges and achievements
Unique visual badges shown in user profiles (`/profile`):

- **AntiRaidBot Developer**
  Assigned to official creators and developers of the project.

- **Verification**
  Officially confirmed trusted user account.

- **Premium**
  Automatically issued to members with an active premium subscription.

- **System bot**
  Official technical or service bot of the project.

- **SOTI Partner**
  Official bot partner of the SOTI monitoring system.

- **SDC Developer**
  Third-party bot developer in the SDC community.

- **Dangerous bot**
  Automatic label for a malicious bot seen in raids.

- **Raider**
  Special status for malicious accounts involved in server crashes.
general.help.access:
Command access
Access table for running commands:

**Available to all members:**
- `/help`, `/ping`, `/invite`, `/profile`

**Server owner only:**
- `/amnesty`, `/role_clear`, `/limits`, `/trusted`, `/settings`, `/bot_verify`, `/gsync`, `/grole_copy`, `/custom`

**Server owner or trusted users:**
- `/permcopy`, `/creact`, `/creact_menu`, `/role_blacklist`, `/aban_menu`, `/raid`, `/status`, `/antiremove_role`, `/gban_menu`, `/freeze_mode`, `/language`

**Server owner or configured roles:**
- `/aban @user`, `/gban @user`, `/gunban @user`

general.bot_verify.dashboard_header:
New bot verification
Manage new bot verification checks when joining **{guild_name}**.
general.bot_verify.dashboard_description:
**Module description**
The module protects your server from crash bots and automated spam accounts.
When enabled, all newly added bots that have not passed official Discord verification will be removed immediately.
Verified bots and bots from trusted developers can join freely.
[What is bot verification? (Discord article)](https://support-dev.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/23926564536471-How-Do-I-Get-My-App-Verified)

general.bot_verify.dashboard_disabled:
Module disabled
Bot verification check is now **disabled**.

custombanner.commands.custom.desc: • Open the menu for custom bot avatar and banner
custombanner.commands.custom.only_guild: This command can only be used on a server.
custombanner.commands.custom.no_permissi: Only the **server owner** can change the bot's custom profile.
custombanner.commands.custom.premium_req: Custom bot avatar and banner are only available to servers with an active premium subscription.
custombanner.views.menu.title: Custom bot profile
custombanner.views.menu.desc: Customize the avatar or banner of AntiRaidBot only for this server.
custombanner.views.menu.recommendations_: Avatar: square image, recommended size is `512x512` or higher.
Banner: wide image, recommended size is `960x540` or `1920x1080`.
custombanner.views.menu.usage_desc: Click the button below, upload the file in the modal window, and confirm. The **Reset** button will restore the default avatar and banner of the main bot.
custombanner.views.menu.cannot_interact_: Only the server owner can interact with this menu.
creact.commands.creact.param.emoji: Emoji that triggers message deletion when added
creact.errors.only_owner_or_trusted: Only the **server owner** or **trusted users** can use this command.
creact.errors.bot_no_manage_messages: The bot needs `Manage Messages` permission to use this feature.
creact.errors.save_failed: Failed to save the status. Try again later.
creact.errors.invalid_emoji_desc:
This emoji cannot be used.

<:tok:1474650954350592000> **Allowed:**
• Regular emojis (`🔥`, `✅`, `🗑️`)
• Custom emojis **from this server**

<:stop:1474650936029741159> **Forbidden:**
• Emojis from other servers
• Text strings
creact.errors.cannot_delete_owner_or_tru: You cannot delete this message because it was sent by the server owner or a trusted user.
creact.errors.message_too_old_desc:
Cannot delete message: it is older than **14 days**.
Discord does not allow bots to delete such messages.
creact.errors.bot_no_perms_in_channel_de: The bot cannot delete the message in {channel_mention} because it is missing the **Manage Messages** permission.
creact.errors.role_too_high_desc: Cannot delete message from {author_mention}: my role is lower than theirs.
creact.errors.deletion_error_desc: The bot has insufficient permissions to delete this message (possibly the channel is protected).
creact.errors.general_error_desc: An error occurred while deleting the message.
creact.errors.only_in_guild: This command can only be used on servers.
creact.views.add_select.limit_reached_de: You have reached the limit ({max_roles} roles). Delete some roles before adding new ones.
creact.views.remove_select.no_roles_desc: The list of allowed roles is empty
creact.views.remove_select.success_desc: Role {role_mention} successfully removed from the allowed list for `/creact`!
creact.views.remove_select.error_desc: Failed to remove the role from the allowed list.
creact.views.menu.header:
Management `/creact`
Setting up roles whose members **are allowed to delete messages via reaction** on server **{guild_name}**.
creact.views.menu.interaction_error_desc: You cannot interact with this menu.
creact.views.success.role_management_des:
Role Management:
You can change roles via the `/creact_menu` command
antiremove.errors.only_owner_or_trusted: Only the server owner or trusted users can use this command!
antiremove.views.add_select.placeholder: Select members to add to protection...
antiremove.views.add_select.limit_reache: You have reached the limit (15 members). Remove some members to add new ones.
antiremove.views.add_select.not_on_serve: User is not on the server
antiremove.views.remove_select.no_users_: The list of protected members is empty
antiremove.views.remove_select.success_d: User {user_mention} successfully removed from the role change protection list!
antiremove.views.menu.header:
Role Change Protection
Setting up the list of members whose roles **are forbidden to change** on server **{guild_name}**.
antiremove.views.menu.rules_desc:
If someone tries to remove or assign roles to a protected member, the bot will automatically restore them and punish the offender.
Protection does not apply to actions of the server owner.
antiremove.views.menu.interaction_error_: You cannot interact with this menu.
events.commands.dm_unavailable_desc: Commands of this bot cannot be used in DMs. Please add the bot to a server to use commands.
events.commands.cooldown_message: Please wait another {retry_after:.1f} sec. before using this button again.
events.commands.button_outdated.title: Button outdated
events.commands.button_outdated.desc:
The menu session has expired or the bot was restarted.
Please invoke the required command again to open a fresh menu.
events.commands.button_outdated.report: If this happens too frequently please [let us know!](https://discord.com/invite/t6d8u8JBuy)
events.owner_transfer.new_owner_desc: Server ownership of **{guild_name}** has been transferred to you.
events.owner_transfer.old_owner_desc: You are no longer the owner of server **{guild_name}**.
events.freeze_mode.webhook_delete_reason: Freeze mode: webhook creation is forbidden
events.freeze_mode.webhook_deleted_desc: A webhook was detected and deleted under **freeze mode**.
events.helpers.err_no_manage_roles: The bot does not have manage_roles permissions
events.helpers.err_role_low: The bot role position is not high enough
events.freeze_mode.role_delete_reason: Freeze mode: role creation is forbidden for everyone
events.freeze_mode.role_delete_fail_desc: The bot has insufficient permissions to delete roles in freeze mode.
events.freeze_mode.role_deleted_desc: A role was created and deleted under **freeze mode**.
events.helpers.role_deleted_sys_desc: Role **`{role_name}`** (`ID: {role_id}`) was **deleted from the server**, therefore it was automatically removed from the following systems on server **{guild_name}**:
events.freeze_mode.channel_delete_reason: Freeze mode: channel creation is forbidden for everyone
events.freeze_mode.channel_delete_fail_d: The bot has insufficient permissions to delete channels in freeze mode.
events.freeze_mode.channel_deleted_desc: A channel was created and deleted under **freeze mode**.
events.freeze_mode.bot_kick_reason: Freeze mode: adding bots is forbidden
events.freeze_mode.bot_kicked_desc: A third-party bot was detected and kicked under **freeze mode**.
events.freeze_mode.bot_kick_fail_desc: The bot has insufficient permissions to kick a third-party bot, although freeze mode is active.
events.freeze_mode.bot_kick_fail_recomme: Please check the bot's permissions and its role position.
events.helpers.antiremove_role_desc.titl: The **AntiRemove** system blocked an attempt to remove roles from user {mention} on server **{guild_name}**.
events.raid_failure.title: Failed to remove roles!
events.raid_failure.desc: The bot could not remove roles from user on server **{guild_name}**.
events.raid_failure.rules_desc:
1. Ensure the bot has the `Manage Roles` (manage_roles) permission enabled.
2. Move the bot's role in server settings higher than the roles of the rule-breakers.
events.raid_owner.title: Raid detected!
events.raid_owner.desc: User `{username}` has violated safety limits on your server **{guild_name}**.
events.raid_owner.measures_desc: All roles of the offender were automatically removed to protect the server.
events.raid_user.title: Limit violation!
events.raid_user.desc: You have exceeded the allowed action limit on server **{guild_name}**.
events.raid_user.what_done_val: All your roles have been automatically removed.
events.raid_user.what_next_val: Contact the server administration to clarify details. This is an automated safety notice from **Anti Raid Bot**.
events.unverified_bot.title: Unverified bot detected
events.unverified_bot.desc: An unauthorized bot addition attempt was prevented on server **{guild_name}**.
events.unverified_bot.measures_val: The bot was successfully **removed (kicked)** from the server automatically for security reasons.
events.premium_activated.title: Premium activated!
events.premium_activated.desc: Congratulations on activating your Premium subscription for **Anti Raid Bot**!
events.premium_activated.feature_3: **Command `/custom`** — custom bot avatar and banner on your server
events.premium_activated.feature_4: **3 dedicated channels** on the support server
events.premium_activated.feature_6: **Priority support** and access to testing new features
events.premium_activated.warning_val:
For premium features to continue working, **you must remain on our support server**.
If you leave the server, premium access will be temporarily disabled.
events.premium_expired.title: Premium subscription expired!
events.premium_expired.desc: Your Premium subscription for **Anti Raid Bot** is no longer active.
events.premium_expired.feature_1: Role limit in commands returned to standard: **5**
events.premium_expired.feature_4: You lost access to dedicated channels on the support server
events.premium_expired.restore_item_1: If your subscription is still available — simply return to our support server!
events.premium_expired.restore_item_2: You can extend your subscription at any time:
events.blacklisted_role_user.title: System prevented role assignment!
events.blacklisted_role_user.desc: An attempt to assign a forbidden blacklisted role to you was prevented.
events.blacklisted_role_actor.title: Action blocked!
events.blacklisted_role_actor.desc: You attempted to assign a forbidden role from the blacklist.
events.blacklisted_role_actor.why_reason: This role is on the server's **role blacklist**.
Its assignment is blocked by our automated protection system.
events.blacklisted_role_owner.title: Blacklisted role assignment attempt
events.blacklisted_role_owner.desc: An attempt to assign a role from the blacklist was blocked on your server.
helpers.low_role.title: Low bot role position
helpers.low_role.desc: The bot's role (AntiRaid - Bot) is not the highest on the server. This limits its ability to manage roles and fully protect the server.
helpers.low_role.what_to_do_desc:
Set the {bot_role_mention}.
This ensures no one gets a role higher than the bot.
After this, the bot will be able to protect the server 100%.
helpers.low_role.why_important_desc:
Without this, the bot won't be able to remove roles from offenders, block raids, or manage critical protection settings.

[More details on why this is needed](https://antiraidbot.ru/first-role/)
helpers.protection.admin_loss_desc:
The bot has lost the **`Administrator`** permission required for full server protection.

**Raid protection has been automatically disabled** because the bot can no longer guarantee security.
helpers.protection.role_position_title: Bot role is no longer the highest
helpers.protection.role_position_desc:
The bot's role has been moved below other roles, allowing users to bypass protection.

**Raid protection has been disabled** because the bot cannot manage members with higher roles.
helpers.limit.malicious_bot_desc: Bot `{bot_user}` was automatically removed for exceeding action limit.
helpers.limit.kick_failed_desc: The bot lacks permissions to kick the member.
helpers.limit.reason_desc: The bot is missing the `Kick Members` permission.
helpers.limit.solution_desc: Move the bot's role higher in the roles list and ensure it has all necessary permissions.
badges.developer.name: AntiRaidBot Developer
badges.developer.description: This badge is assigned to an **official developer** of the Anti Raid Bot project.
badges.verification.name: Verification
badges.verification.description: This badge confirms account **verification** ? an officially checked user.
badges.system_bot.name: System bot
badges.system_bot.description: This badge is assigned to **official bots** from the Anti Raid Bot developers.
badges.dangerous_bot.name: Dangerous bot
badges.dangerous_bot.description: This badge means the account is a **dangerous bot** seen in raids.
badges.raider.name: Raider
badges.raider.description: This badge is assigned to **raiders** ? users seen crashing servers.
badges.soti_partner.name: SOTI Partner
badges.soti_partner.description: This badge marks a **SOTI monitoring partner** ? an official Soti bot partner.
badges.sdc_developer.name: SDC Developer
badges.sdc_developer.description: This badge is assigned to **third-party bot developers** in SDC.
badges.premium.name: Premium
badges.premium.description:
This user **supported the project** by buying a premium subscription for the bot.
You can also support development and get access to premium features:

🔗 [Get Premium](https://antiraidbot.ru/premium/)
badges.premium.select_description: User supported the project with Premium
badges.remove.name: ⛔ Remove badge
